title: Importing invoice pdf details to board
excerpt: I am trying to find a way to import details from a pdf invoice into my inventory board. I only require the customers name, items, date, and invoice number

posts.author: ConnerDom (Conner)
posts.cookedHtml: I am trying to find a way to import details from a pdf invoice into my inventory board. I only require the customers name, items, date, and invoice number

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
Do you have AI turned on in your board? You’ll just need to add text columns and turn on ‘auto fill with ai’. Then pick what you want it to extract.
